summary: Vulnerability audit (gitleaks, bandit, shellcheck). C1/C2 resolved (creds deleted from relay-tools remote). C3+H3 fixed locally (mcp-security-hub, needs push). H4 fixed (audit.sh). M1 resolved (searxng secret to .env, pushed). M4 resolved (agent_lib logging, pushed). ~90 FPs dismissed. Key: shell=True is design, HMAC is gate.
